ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the city agency handling the request */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the city agency handling the request */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of service request (e.g., Standing Water, Unsanitary Animal Pvt Property) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the service request was created */,
  "resolution_action_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution action was last updated */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution action taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service request (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location of the request */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of facility where the request was made */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the request */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the request */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date the request was closed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the request (e.g., phone, app, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_agency FOREIGN KEY ("agency") REFERENCES agency_personnel ("agency")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "cross_street_1" TEXT /* Name of the first cross street */,
  "cross_street_2" TEXT /* Name of the second cross street */,
  "council_district" TEXT /* City council district */,
  "police_precinct" TEXT /* Police precinct */,
  "census_tract" TEXT /* Census tract */,
  "bin_number" TEXT /* Building Identification Number (BIN) */,
  "bbl_number" TEXT /* Borough, Block, and Lot (BBL) number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility or location (e.g., 1-2 Family Dwelling, 3+ Family Apartment Building) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the facility type */,
  "common_issues" TEXT /* Common issues associated with the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency personnel */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the personnel belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the personnel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the personnel */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel within the agency */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the personnel started working */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the personnel ended their service (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_request_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being assigned */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel assigned to the request */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the request was assigned */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment status was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_request_assignments_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES agency_personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_request_assignments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)
